title: styphelia javanica
intro: Styphelia javanica, also known as Java tea tree, is a type of flowering plant native to Indonesia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Styphelia javanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. Styphelia javanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
